data.title: Skyflow introduces MCP Data Security for Enterprises/SaaS, using AI agents, ensuring secure data access.
data.description: Skyflow, based in Palo Alto, California, has introduced MCP Data Protection for Enterprises. This innovative solution allows companies utilizing AI agents to securely access sensitive data while maintaining functionality. The launch aims to address the growing need for data security in business environments, particularly those leveraging artificial intelligence. This development signifies Skyflow's commitment to advancing data protection measures, catering to enterprises seeking robust safeguards for critical information.

data.title: Belden's PPC Hybrid Fiber/Power OVP Terminal wins Silver at 2025 ISE Network Innovators' Awards.
data.description: St. Louis-based Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC), a prominent worldwide supplier of comprehensive connection solutions, revealed that their cutting-edge PPC Hybrid Fiber/Power OVP Terminal has been acknowledged as a top industry product by the ISE Network Innovators’ Awards. Judges, drawn from the telecom sector, granted the product Silver honoree recognition. This was based on factors such as originality, innovation, cost-effectiveness, and its beneficial impact on customers.

data.title: DevvStream buys Bitcoin and Solana using initial $10M; plans to expand credit facility to $300M.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, DevvStream Corp. (Nasdaq: DEVS) revealed its launch of a crypto treasury strategy, using a portion of its initial $10 million from a $300 million senior secured convertible notes facility with Helena Global Investment Opportuniti. The strategy involves investing in Bitcoin ($BTC) and Solana ($SOL) as part of the company's focus on carbon management and environmental asset development. DevvStream is recognized as a key player in this field, engaging in the investment and sale of such assets.

data.title: LP Building Solutions declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share to common stockholders.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, LP Building Solutions has revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share for common stockholders.

data.title: TelevisaUnivision names John Farrell as Head of Partnerships, overseeing global content distribution. Repots to CEO Daniel Alegre.
data.description: In Miami, a prominent Spanish-language media company, TelevisaUnivision, revealed the naming of John Farrell as Head of Partnerships. This newly established position aims to consolidate the company's worldwide content distribution, platform partnerships, corporate development, and global expansion endeavors. Tasked with overseeing distribution strategies for linear, digital, streaming, and emerging platforms, Farrell will directly report to TelevisaUnivision CEO Daniel Alegre. This move signals the company's strategic focus on enhancing its outreach and growth in the industry.
